2605.12699.title: Modeling Heterophily in Multiplex Graphs: An Adaptive Approach for Node Classification
2605.12699.paper_summary: Existing multiplex graph models often assume homophily, where connected nodes tend to belong to the same class or share similar attributes. Consequently, these models may struggle with graphs exhibiting heterophily, where connected nodes typically belong to different classes and have dissimilar attributes. While recent methods have been developed to learn reliable node representations from unidimensional graphs with heterophily, they do not fully address the complexities of multiplex graphs. In a multiplex graph, nodes are linked through multiple types of edges (referred to as dimensions), which can simultaneously exhibit homophilic and heterophilic interactions. To address this gap, we propose \methodname, a novel method for node classification in multiplex graphs that adapts to both homophilic and heterophilic dimensions. \methodname introduces dimension-specific compatibility matrices to model varying degrees of homophily and heterophily across dimensions. A key innovation is its use of a product of trainable low-pass and high-pass filters, approximated via Chebyshev polynomials, to capture both smooth and abrupt changes in the graph signal. By composing these filters and optimizing label predictions using a proximal-gradient method, \methodname dynamically adjusts to the heterophilic characteristics of each dimension. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets provide evidence that \methodname captures the complex interplay of homophilic and heterophilic interactions in multiplex graphs, and tends to yield improved node classification performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.
2605.12699.paper_summary_zh: 現有的多重圖模型通常假設同質性，即連接的節點傾向於屬於相同類別或共享相似屬性。<lb/>因此，這些模型在處理顯示異質性的圖時可能會遇到困難，因為在這種情況下，連接的節點通常屬於不同的類別並且具有不相似的屬性。<lb/>雖然最近已經開發出從具有異質性的單維圖中學習可靠節點表示的方法，但這些方法並未完全解決多重圖的複雜性。<lb/>在多重圖中，節點通過多種類型的邊（稱為維度）相連，這些邊可以同時顯示同質性和異質性互動。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們提出了\methodname，一種適應同質性和異質性維度的多重圖節點分類新方法。<lb/>\methodname引入了維度特定的相容性矩陣，以建模不同維度之間的同質性和異質性的變化程度。<lb/>一個關鍵的創新是它使用可訓練的低通和高通濾波器的乘積，通過切比雪夫多項式進行近似，以捕捉圖信號中的平滑和突變變化。<lb/>通過組合這些濾波器並使用近端梯度方法優化標籤預測，\methodname動態調整每個維度的異質性特徵。<lb/>在合成和現實世界數據集上的廣泛實驗提供了證據，表明\methodname捕捉了多重圖中同質性和異質性互動的複雜相互作用，並且相較於最先進的方法，往往能夠提高節點分類性能。
2605.12699.author: Kamel Abdous et.al.
2605.12699.authors: Kamel Abdous, Nairouz Mrabah, Mohamed Bouguessa
